biological_replicate: we pretreated human primary T-cells with increasing concentrations of WFA
technical_replicate: loaded in triplicate in the CIM-Plate 16 chambers
experimental_design: T-cells were stimulated to migrate via LFA-1/ICAM-1 adhesive interactions
factor_value: this concentration of WFA (1.25 μM) was chosen for further analysis
number_of_technical_replicates: loaded in triplicate in the CIM-Plate 16 chambers
number_of_biological_replicates: isolated from blood samples collected from healthy volunteers
number_of_samples: since the number of biological replicates is '1' and no fractions are mentioned
